title: Yam Programme Home
body: Welcome to the WAITA-EACRI Yam Improvement Programme space. Start here for protocols, meeting notes and the grant workplan.

title: Yam Variety Screening Protocol
body: Standard protocol for screening EACRI yam lines across Nsukka and Nairobi sites, including germination scoring.

title: Bi-weekly Call Notes
body: Running notes from the Wed 3pm WAT bi-weekly calls with Amina and the EACRI team.

title: WAITA Grant Workplan
body: Draft workplan and timeline for the WAITA proposal due Oct 2. Site responsibilities and milestones.

title: Joint Publication Plan
body: Authorship, target journals and timeline for joint NNU-EACRI yam publications.

title: Nsukka Site Field Log
body: Field observations from the Nsukka screening plots, maintained by Tunde.

title: Ibadan WAITA Visit Plan
body: Logistics for the Oct 12-14 Ibadan WAITA visit: agenda, travel and site tour.

title: Cassava Programme Home
body: Welcome to the WAADA Cassava Biofortification space. Protocols, field notes and analysis live here.

title: Field Trial Protocol
body: Standard operating procedure for the Udi LGA field trials: planting, sampling and cold-chain handling.

title: Beta-carotene Assay Method
body: Lab method for measuring provitamin-A content in cassava roots.

title: Year 2 Analysis Plan
body: Statistical analysis plan for the Year 2 cassava data using the R analysis repo.

title: Paper Submission Checklist
body: Checklist for the West African Journal of Crop Research submission targeted for Oct 16.

title: Udi Plot Maps
body: Plot layout, tags and GPS coordinates for the Udi LGA trial sites.

title: Farmer Engagement Notes
body: Notes on cooperative engagement, seed-access questions and adoption barriers raised by farmers.

title: ESFES Workshop Materials
body: Booklet drafts and slide decks for the quarterly ESFES farmer training workshops in Nsukka LGA.

title: Lab Schedule and Cover
body: Rotation for lab and field cover, including when Derek runs the lab during field trips.

title: Equipment Inventory
body: Inventory of field tools, soil test kits and cold-chain equipment.

title: Germination Scoring Guide
body: Scoring rubric for yam line germination, with a note on the poor performers in Nsukka soil.

title: Conference Abstract Drafts
body: Draft abstracts for the early-Oct NNU Crop Science department conference.

title: Data Backup Procedure
body: How field data is entered same-day and backed up to the WAADA-Cassava Drive folder.
